docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $95.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TANCREDI VINCENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BULLMAN NANETTE AS TO DEFENDANT TANCREDI VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TANCREDI VINCENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BULLMAN NANETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANCREDI VINCENT $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TANCREDI VINCENT
